title: Servers Link
description: Link multiple servers together and synchronize players list, chat, inventory...
body: # Servers Link Servers Link is a `server-side` mod that lets you link multiple servers together. With this mod, players' inventory, achievements, chat *(including private messages)* and the player list are synchronized between the servers. If you want to install and configure this mod, you should read this [README](https://github.com/kgriff0n/servers-link/blob/master/README.md). If you want to see this mod in action, check out this video : A better video with more details may come in the future.
